title: Customize item terminology - Allow capitalization
excerpt: Love the Customize item terminology feature that allows us to change the default first “Item” column label. As of today, only the first letter of the label appears capitalized. It would be fantastic it allowed users to a…

posts.author: LegalMarTech (Christy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Love the Customize item terminology feature that allows us to change the default first “Item” column label. As of today, only the first letter of the label appears capitalized. It would be fantastic it allowed users to adjust capitalization based on preference.

For example, right now when I input “Practice Groups/Industry Teams” it appears as “Practice groups/industry teams” or if I input “PGs/ITs” it appears as “Pgs/its”.

Thanks!
